'''Kulltu Kutta''' was a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] who participated in free-for-all mortal brawls in the [[The Cauldron|Cauldron]] arena, the largest combat pit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]], during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. Kulltu Kutta fought in the Cauldron on [[sowsquatch]]back when [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] [[Mission to Rattatak|entered]] the fray and ultimately emerged victorious over the other gladiators.

==Biography==
[[File:KulltuKutta.jpg|280px|left|thumb|Kulltu Kutta kills Krutch]]
Kulltu Kutta came from a long line of hired fighters and,<ref name="Sticker" /> shortly after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> became a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]], eventually ending up in the [[The Cauldron]] arena.<ref name="CW" /> It was the largest gladiatorial pit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]], filled with violent warriors, where war barons and generals sought out the best combatants to win their wars.<ref name="DBR">{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}}</ref> Therefore, Kulltu Kutta, like many other gladiators,<ref name="CW" /> entered a deadly free-for-all battle,<ref name="EGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> but it was a rare gladiator indeed who could survive multiple fights there.<ref name="DBR" /> In one battle, Kulltu Kutta fought atop a [[sowsquatch]] and attacked another gladiator,<ref name="CW" /> [[Krutch]],<ref name="Sticker" /> splitting the opponent in half with a blade.<ref name="CW" /> However, a short time later, Kulltu Kutta was killed by a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] adversary.<ref name="Sticker" />

==Personality and traits==
Relative to the other gladiators of the Cauldron, Kulltu Kutta was a rather short-statured alien.<ref name="CW" />

==Equipment==
During combat in the Rattataki arena, Kulltu Kutta wore a mask and brown armor and wielded a [[Sword/Legends|sword]] in the left hand.<ref name="CW" /> In battle, Kutta rode a huge, barely tamed sowsquatch, gripping the harness handle with one hand.<ref name="Sticker" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kulltu Kutta<ref name="Sticker" /> first appeared as an unnamed character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later given a name in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="DK">{{DK|url=us/9780756607593-ultimate-sticker-book-star-wars-clone-wars|text=Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars|nolive=1}}</ref>
